body_txt: A new character will walk into a situation that seems bizarre, flaky, extremely dangerous, or otherwise very much out of what he considers ordinary. He asks someone, "Is it always like this around here?" The answer typically says that, yes, it is (" Welcome to My World " or "You get used to it"), perhaps with a suggestion that the questioner hasn't seen the half of it ("No, today's rather quiet") or a bit of reassurance ("Well, just on Tuesdays "). See also First Day from Hell .
